---
name: Feature / Optimization Request
about: Suggest a new feature, architecture improvement, or performance optimization
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
<!-- One-line description of what you're proposing -->

## Problem / Motivation
<!-- What problem does this solve? What's the current limitation? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe your approach. Include pseudocode or references if helpful. -->

## Performance Analysis (for optimization requests)
<!-- If this is a perf improvement, include:
- What bottleneck does it target?
- Theoretical bandwidth/compute math
- Reference implementation (llama.cpp, ggml, etc.) -->

## Relevant Phase
<!-- Which phase in IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md does this relate to? Or is it new? -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- What other approaches did you consider and why did you rule them out? -->

## Are you willing to implement this?
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR
- [ ] I can help review/test
- [ ] Just suggesting — happy for someone else to pick it up
